EmailTemplate.name: Notify Customer on Interest Waiver Approved
EmailTemplate.subject: Interest Waiver Approved – Credit Note Issued
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear Mr / Mrs {!Interest_Waiver__c.Customer_Name__c},
We are pleased to inform you that a credit amount of Rs. {!TEXT(Interest_Waiver__c.Waiver_Amount__c)} has been approved and completed against the interest waiver towards your Runwal unit {!Interest_Waiver__c.Unit__c}.
We thank you for being a part of the Runwal Family.
Warm regards, Runwal Groups
